unresolved.title: Where did all the UK game events go?
unresolved.summary: A recurring question in the UK games scene is why such a significant territory can't sustain its own major consumer event, in the style of the USA's PAX, Frances's Paris Games Week or Germany's Gamescom. The country's largest video game consumer show, EGX, paused during COVID before being merged into the pop-culture behemoth of MCM Comic Con in 2024, while other major events like Insomnia, WASD, and EGX Rezzed have long since folded. ( GamesIndustry.biz  was formerly owned by MCM and EGX operator ReedPop.)    Read more

unresolved.title: Trailer Game Review: This Wasn’t In The K53 Manual
unresolved.summary:
Beads of sweat dot across my forehead as a heavy frown sits between my eyes. My gaze is fixed into the rear-view mirror, staring squarely at the unruly trailer that bounces left and jinks right. Frantically pawing at the steering wheel to keep it aligned, I slowly navigate it upward into the spiral staircase of steel. Feathering the accelerator and keeping my other foot hovering over the clutch in case I need to brake, I keep ascending to impossible heights. […] 
 The post  Trailer Game Review: This Wasn’t In The K53 Manual  appeared first on  NAG .
